mapper.sql: id, consultation_no, appointment_id, user_id, doctor_id, form_type, chief_complaint, present_illness, past_history, examination, diagnosis, treatment, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT cf.*, a.patient_name, a.patient_id_card, a.status AS apt_status, d.name AS doctor_name, d.title AS doctor_title, dp.dept_name, s.visit_date, s.visit_time FROM consultation_form cf LEFT JOIN appointment a ON cf.appointment_id = a.id LEFT JOIN number_source ns ON a.number_source_id = ns.id LEFT JOIN schedule s ON ns.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN doctor d ON cf.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN dept dp ON d.dept_id = dp.id WHERE cf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY cf.create_time DESC

SELECT cf.*, a.patient_name, a.patient_id_card, a.status AS apt_status, d.name AS doctor_name, d.title AS doctor_title, dp.dept_name, s.visit_date, s.visit_time FROM consultation_form cf LEFT JOIN appointment a ON cf.appointment_id = a.id LEFT JOIN number_source ns ON a.number_source_id = ns.id LEFT JOIN schedule s ON ns.schedule_id = s.id LEFT JOIN doctor d ON cf.doctor_id = d.id LEFT JOIN dept dp ON d.dept_id = dp.id WHERE cf.user_id = #{userId} AND (d.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR dp.dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR cf.chief_complaint LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR cf.diagnosis LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR cf.form_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY cf.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consultation_form (consultation_no, appointment_id, user_id, doctor_id, form_type, chief_complaint, present_illness, past_history, create_time) VALUES (#{consultationNo}, #{appointmentId}, #{userId}, #{doctorId}, #{formType}, #{chiefComplaint}, #{presentIllness}, #{pastHistory}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE consultation_form SET form_type = #{formType}, chief_complaint = #{chiefComplaint}, present_illness = #{presentIllness}, past_history = #{pastHistory}, examination = #{examination}, diagnosis = #{diagnosis}, treatment = #{treatment}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
